title: FUNWHOLE Skate-Shop Lighting Building-Bricks Set - Street Fusion City Skate Store Collection LED Light Modular Building Kit 1573 Pcs for Adults and Teen
features: 【Design Inspiration】The skateboarding and graffiti experiences of our team members sparked our creativity. We noticed that existing urban building block sets lacked representation of street culture. Thus, the skate shop was born, merging our youthful dreams of skateboarding, graffiti, and hip-hop.

【Authentic Street Skateboarding Experience】The set includes 12 pieces of street-style clothing and hats, along with 11 skateboard-related parts, allowing you to create your ideal skater look. The intricate designs of the vending machine, handrail stairs, and skateboarding terrain enhance playability while authentically depicting street skateboarding scenes.

【Intricate Detail Design】The skate shop is a two-and-a-half-story building. The ground floor features a sales area showcasing various skateboard accessories and graffiti tools; the second floor is dedicated to enjoying hip-hop music and video games; the top floor serves as a barbecue and graffiti zone. The set includes 6 graffiti artworks and 25 colorfully printed bricks related to street culture, creating a vibrant street visual style.

【Exclusive Lighting Accessories (batteries not included)】8 carefully designed lighted areas cover both indoor and outdoor spaces. The outdoor graffiti wall, illuminated by violet ambient lighting on the side of the building, creates a stylish and trendy street atmosphere.

【Modular City Compatibility】The Street Fusion series is an urban building block set defined by its street visual style. Its specifications ensure compatibility with other modular city building sets while maintaining a unique aesthetic, offering a variety of combination options for urban building block enthusiasts.
